intended_use: Videa Caries Assist is a computer-assisted detection (CADe) device that analyzes intraoral radiographs to identify and localize carious lesions. Videa Caries Assist is indicated for use by board licen
intended_use_full: Videa Caries Assist is a computer-assisted detection (CADe) device that analyzes intraoral radiographs to identify and localize carious lesions. Videa Caries Assist is indicated for use by board licensed dentists for the concurrent review of bitewing (BW) radiographs acquired from adult patients aged 22 years or older.
target_condition: Carious lesions (dental caries) at all penetration depths
ground_truth: Three US board-certified dentists provided ground truth annotations
other_metrics: AFROC FOM: 0.740 (95% CI: 0.721, 0.760) for standalone; aided reader AFROC FOM 0.739 vs unaided 0.667 (difference 0.072, 95% CI: 0.047, 0.097, p < 0.0001); False Positive Fraction: 0.335; Non-Lesion Fraction: 0.599
